properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 54/23

 FROM MAY 16 2023.
 M/V RAMFORM HYPERION IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS AND TOWING 14 STREAMERS AT 6NM LENGTH AND A WIDTH OF 1 NM.
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 7 NM ASTERN AND 3NM ABEAM.
 SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 72 AND 16.
 GUARD VESSEL THOR OMEGA AND AAS PROVIDER IN ATTENDANCE.
  
 IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A. 72-03.2N 018-28.2E
 B. 71-07.9N 019-05.8E
 C. 71-16.1N 021-16.1E
 D. 72-11.7N 020-43.8E
 E. 72-03.2N 018-28.2E
  
 ESTIMATED WORK DURATION: 40 DAYS.
